rss.title: Fewer heat-related deaths in 2025 despite warmest summer
rss.snippet: Summer 2025 was the warmest UK summer on record, with four heatwaves, a top temperature of nearly 38C and a mean temperature of 16.1C

rss.title: Doctors lose new jobs package as strike to go ahead
rss.snippet: The offer of 1,000 more training posts has been withdrawn after the union refused to scrap the planned six-day strike.

rss.title: Prince William praises £20m milestone for Bowelbabe fund
rss.snippet: The Bowelbabe fund, set up by Dame Deborah James in 2022, helps to support Cancer Research UK.
